title: Shopping for clothes
description: Find your size, try it on, and buy it: mall shopping, fixed prices
location: Clothing shop, Mong Kok Ladies' Market area
context: Mall shops and chain stores in Hong Kong have fixed prices, fitting rooms, and card payment. Sizes are labelled S/M/L or by chest and waist. No bargaining here; that belongs to the street markets.
cultural_note: The concept of 開市 (hoi1 si5, "opening the market") shapes morning trading at Hong Kong's street stalls and wet markets: the first sale of the day is considered auspicious, bringing luck for all business that follows. Vendors are more willing to negotiate in the first hour of trading. Arriving at Temple Street or Mong Kok's Ladies' Market when it opens and making a polite offer is considered entirely proper.

lines.speaker: staff
lines.english: Welcome! What are you looking for?

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: ngo5 soeng2 wan2 gin6 T-shirt, sam1 sik1 ge3.
lines.english: I'm looking for a T-shirt — something dark coloured.

lines.speaker: staff
lines.cjk: 呢邊有幾款，睇吓鍾唔鍾意。
lines.jyutping: ni1 bin1 jau5 gei2 fun2, tai2 haa5 zung1 m4 zung1 ji3.
lines.english: We have a few styles over here. See if you like any.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 呢件幾好睇，有冇細碼呀？
lines.jyutping: ni1 gin6 gei2 hou2 tai2, jau5 mou5 sai3 maa5 aa3?
lines.english: This one looks nice. Do you have it in a small?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.jyutping: jau5, dang2 ngo5 lo2 bei2 nei5.
lines.english: Yes, let me get it for you.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 si3 haa5?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.jyutping: si3 san1 sat1 hai2 jau6 sau2 bin1.
lines.english: The fitting room is on your right.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: ngaam1 zoek3, ngo5 jiu3 ni1 gin6 laa3.
lines.english: Fits well, I'll take this one.
